params.name: Along the River
params.description:
On Nov 23, 1101 AD, this masterpiece was created and collected by the imperial palace immediately.
Zhang Zeduan's painting, Along the River, left a lasting impression on Emperor Hui of Song, who personally wrote its name. The painting employs a partly formal, partly loose technique and features light colors. It utilizes aerial and cavalier perspectives, resulting in a well-organized, compact, and smooth composition. The painting's landscapes showcase wilderness, large rivers, and tall city wa …
